title: Headlight Leveling System Structure Description - Components - Auto Leveling System

blocks.text: Headlight Leveling System Structure Description - Components - Auto Leveling System
A headlight leveling motor for driving the vertical optical axis of the headlight is installed at the rear of the headlight assembly.
Changes in front/rear vehicle height are detected by the movement of the suspension arm. The headlight leveling sensor uses a Hall IC sensor.
